missing_package_delivered_002:
# Find a Missing Package that Shows as Delivered



Follow these steps if tracking shows a package as delivered in Your Orders but you can't find it.



##### 1 - Confirm shipping address in Your Orders

##### 

Verify if your shipping address in Your Orders is correct. For more information on how to handle a wrong shipping address, go to Add and Manage Addresses.



##### 2 - Search for a notice of delivery attempt



* Check the Message Center.
* Search for a delivery confirmation in Your Orders.
* Check your mailbox or wherever else you receive mail.
* Search for a delivery photo.



##### 3 - Check around the delivery location



Check your delivery instructions in Your Addresses. The package could have been left where you requested.



##### 4 - Ask your household members and neighbors



Check if someone else accepted the delivery.



##### 5 - Wait 48 hours for the package to be delivered



Packages may be scanned as delivered before arrival.



##### 6 - You can check with the carrier



The carrier may have more information about the location of the package. To track your package on the carrier website or contact them, go to Carrier Contact Information.



##### What to do next?



If you have not located the package after following the steps above, you can:



If your order is shipped and sold by a third-party seller, contact the seller directly for assistance. Go to Contact a Third-Party Seller.

If your order was shipped by Amazon, contact Customer Service within 30 days of expected delivery. We'll do everything we can to help.

push_notifications_tracking_003:
# Push Notifications for Shipment Tracking



You can set up or edit push notifications to track your orders.



To receive push notifications for shipment tracking, ensure your phone settings allow app notifications and then turn on push notifications in the Amazon app.



##### Enable Push Notifications on Your Device



For iOS:



* Ensure you have the Amazon app (Go to the App Store and search Amazon)
* Go to Settings > Notifications > Amazon > Allow Notifications
* Turn on “Time Sensitive Notifications” and select all alert options for best notification of delivery



For Android:



* Ensure you have the Amazon app (Go to the App Store and search Amazon)
* Go to Settings > Notifications > App Notifications > Amazon > Turn on
* Turn on “Time Sensitive Notifications” and select all alert options for best notification of delivery



##### Check Your Push Notifications in the Amazon App



Go to the Amazon app > Your Account (Person icon in the bottom left corner of the app) > Settings (cog icon in the upper right hand corner of the app) > Notifications > Account and shipping. Turn on all for Push notifications.

late_delivery_007:
# Late Deliveries



What to do if your order didn't arrive on the estimated delivery date.



On this page:



* What to do if your delivery is late
* Why some deliveries are delayed
* How we’ll contact you if a delivery is late
* Why wait for 48 hours
* If 48 hours have passed since your estimated delivery date
* Guaranteed deliveries



##### What to do if your delivery is late



If your Amazon delivery is late:



* Track the package for status updates.
* Check your email for carrier notifications.
* Allow 48 hours past the estimated delivery date for unexpected delays.



##### Why some deliveries are delayed



Common reasons for late deliveries include:



* Bad weather
* Heavy traffic
* High delivery demand during holidays
* Custom delays for international packages
* Operational problems like a vehicle breaking down



##### How we’ll contact you if a delivery is late



If Amazon delivers the order, we’ll update your tracking with real-time information about where your package is. We’ll email you when we know there’s a delay. You’ll also find all correspondence in the Message Center.



For orders delivered by a delivery carrier, we’ll still update your Amazon order tracker. Your carrier will have the latest information. Contact your carrier directly for shipping updates. You can also check their website, emails, or mobile app for tracking information.



##### Why wait for 48 hours



Most deliveries arrive within 48 hours. If you haven’t received an email or notification about the delay, wait 48 hours as it may nearly be delivered.



After 48 hours have passed, Customer Services will be able to help you.



##### If 48 hours have passed since your estimated delivery date



If there's still been no news after 48 hours:



* For orders shipped by Amazon, contact Customer Service within 30 days of the estimated delivery date.
* Contact the seller if a third-party seller shipped and sold your order.



##### Guaranteed deliveries



For late guaranteed deliveries, you're eligible to receive a delivery fee refund:



* Go to Your Orders and select your late order.
* Choose Problem with an order, then Shipping or delivery issues, and finally Shipment is late.
* If you have an item with a guaranteed delivery date that wasn't met, we'll provide a refund of the shipping fees.



##### Related Pages



* Track Your Package
* Undeliverable Packages
* Find a Missing Package That Shows As Delivered
* Carrier Contact Information
* Delivery Guarantees

amz_fee_001:
Most items include at least one free return shipping option.

Fees may apply when:
- Selecting a paid shipping or drop-off option
- Returning heavy or bulky items
- Having an unusually high return rate

The fee amount varies depending on:
- Item type
- Shipping method
- Size and handling requirements

amz_fee_002:
Customers may incur fees if they do not complete the return before the return-by date. Fee structure:
- 20% of the item price during the first 30 days after the return-by date
- 100% of the item price after that period

amz_fee_003:
Damage fees may apply if returned items:
- Are damaged
- Are missing parts
- Are not in original condition
- Have removed tags
- Show obvious signs of use

Fees can be:
- Up to 50% of the item price
- 100% of the item price for Amazon Luxury items

amz_fee_004:
A 100% restocking fee may apply for:
- Opened software
- Activated video games
- Used games missing parts
- Opened collectible cards
- Board games
- Figurine figurines with missing parts or packaging

amz_ref_002:
Amazon Gift Card | 2–3 hours
Credit Card | 3–5 business days
Shop with Reward Points | up to 5 business days
Debit Card | up to 10 business days
Checking Account | up to 10 business days
EBT Card | up to 10 business days
Cash at Participating Locations | up to 10 business days
Prepaid Credit Card | up to 30 days depending on issuer
Promotional Certificate | no refund issued

amz_int_004:
Heavy or bulky items include products that:
- Weigh 50 pounds or more
- Exceed 59 inches on the longest side
- Exceed 130 inches in girth

These returns may:
- Incur variable return shipping fees
- Require specialty carrier pickup appointments
- Require home collection services

Additional seller fees may apply for third-party seller returns.

multiple_addresses_001:
# Deliver to Multiple Addresses

With our multi-address delivery feature, you can buy multiple items in one order
and send them to different addresses.

To send items from a single order to multiple addresses:

1. Add the items you want to buy to your Shopping Cart.
2. Select Proceed to Checkout.
4. Follow the on-screen instructions.

If sending any of the items as gifts, you can choose gift wrapping and write a personal
gift message for each item.
